interview_summary:
Port catalog generation from claude-code-multiplai/dotfiles/hooks/generate-*.py into the multiplai-plugin as a unified system under scripts/generators/, plus rename scripts/context_router.py to scripts/context_manager.py (it manages context, not just routes).

LOCKED DECISIONS:
- LLM: claude-sonnet-4-6 at reasoning_effort=medium; all calls via lib/model_client.py (never import claude_agent_sdk directly)
- Diary catalog: per-day entries keyed by YYYY-MM-DD; default window 7 days, configurable
- Skills catalog: optional, gated by enable_skills; scans skills_dir (default ~/.claude/skills)
- Resources catalog: optional, gated by enable_resources AND resources_dir
- Memory + Diary catalogs: mandatory
- Regeneration: piggyback on /dream; state-aware — skip entries whose source hash unchanged; deletion-aware
- Fail-open: context_manager falls back to live scan if mandatory catalogs missing

CONFIG ADDITIONS (plugin.json userConfig):
- enable_resources (bool, default false)
- resources_dir (string, optional)
- enable_skills (bool, default false)
- skills_dir (string, default ~/.claude/skills)
- catalog_model (string, default claude-sonnet-4-6)
- catalog_reasoning_effort (enum low|medium|high, default medium)
- catalog_model_diary (string, optional)
- diary_catalog_days (int, default 7)
- catalog_ttl_hours (int, default 168)

TARGET LAYOUT:
$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/catalogs/
  memory-catalog.json (mandatory)
  diary-catalog.json (mandatory)
  skills-catalog.json (optional)
  resources-catalog.json (optional)
  .generation-state.json (per-file mtimes + hashes + schema_version)

scripts/
  context_manager.py (renamed)
  generate_catalog.py (real dispatcher, not stub)
  generators/
    __init__.py
    base.py (shared LLM client via model_client, retry, state I/O, hashing)
    memory.py (preserve hand fields: sections, bundle, co_retrieve_for)
    diary.py (NEW)
    skills.py
    resources.py

CATALOG ENTRY SHAPES:
- Memory: purpose, intent_domains, anti_domains, hand-preserved sections/bundle/co_retrieve_for, last_updated, _hash
- Diary: date, sessions, projects, topics, summary, word_count, _hash
- Skills/Resources: mirror kit shapes
- Top-level _schema_version: 1 on every catalog

REFERENCE IMPLEMENTATIONS (read-only, DO NOT modify):
- PROJECTS/claude-code-multiplai/dotfiles/hooks/generate-memory-catalog.py
- PROJECTS/claude-code-multiplai/dotfiles/hooks/generate-skill-catalog.py
- PROJECTS/claude-code-multiplai/dotfiles/hooks/generate-resources-catalog.py

FILES TO MODIFY:
- scripts/context_router.py -> rename to scripts/context_manager.py
- hooks.json (update path after rename)
- plugin.json (userConfig additions)
- scripts/generate_catalog.py (replace stub with dispatcher)
- scripts/lib/paths.py (catalog path accessors if needed)
- scripts/lib/config.py (state-file helpers)
- skills/dream.md (integrate catalog regen)

NEW FILES:
- scripts/generators/{__init__,base,memory,diary,skills,resources}.py
- skills/refresh-catalogs.md

PHASED BUILD ORDER:
1. Rename context_router -> context_manager (update hooks.json, imports, tests)
2. Config surface (plugin.json, paths, state-file infra)
3. generators/base.py (LLM via model_client, retry, state I/O, hashing)
4. generators/memory.py (port, preserve hand fields; mtime fallback when no git)
5. generators/diary.py (NEW; per-day with window filter)
6. generators/skills.py (port, gated on enable_skills)
7. generators/resources.py (port, gated on enable_resources AND resources_dir)
8. generate_catalog.py dispatcher
9. /dream integration (skills/dream.md + autodream.py call chain)
10. context_manager catalog-first read path with fail-open
11. /refresh-catalogs skill (manual force/dry-run)
12. Evals: unit per generator, integration for dispatcher, fixture test for context_manager
13. Docs: plugin README update

SCOPE: Work entirely within /Users/spike/Documents/knowhere/PROJECTS/multiplai-plugin-worktrees/catalog-system/ (the worktree). PROJECTS/claude-code-multiplai is reference-only and must NOT be modified. now.md per-project synthesis and cost preview are out of scope.

blocks.name: Rename `context_router.py` → `context_manager.py`
blocks.description:
- Rename `context_router.py` to `context_manager.py`
- Update `hooks.json` to reference the new module name
- Update all internal imports across the plugin to use `context_manager`
- Update all test files referencing `context_router`
- Run `grep -r context_router` across the plugin to confirm zero remaining references
- Add `_read_catalog_or_scan()` stub method with fail-open fallback signature per Decision 8

blocks.name: Catalog config schema and plugin configuration
blocks.description:
- Add `catalogs` nested object to `plugin.json` `userConfig` with all fields and defaults
- Create `CatalogConfig` dataclass in `scripts/generators/config.py`
- Implement config loading from plugin settings with default fallbacks
- Add validation for enum fields (`reasoning_effort`) and numeric bounds (`ttl_hours`, `diary_lookback_days`)
- Write unit tests for config loading and validation edge cases

blocks.name: Generator base class and state management
blocks.description:
- Create `scripts/generators/` package with `__init__.py`
- Implement `GenerationResult` and `GenerationState` dataclasses
- Implement `GeneratorBase` with template method `run()` orchestrating the full lifecycle
- Implement `_load_state()` / `_save_state()` with atomic writes and schema versioning
- Implement `_read_catalog()` / `_write_catalog()` with JSON serialization
- Implement `_call_llm()` with retry logic via `ModelClient`
- Implement hash comparison logic: skip unchanged, detect new, detect deleted
- Implement `dry_run` mode that reports what would change without calling LLM or writing state
- Implement `force` mode that ignores hashes and regenerates all entries
- Write unit tests for lifecycle, state persistence, hash diffing, pruning, and error handling

blocks.name: Memory catalog generator
blocks.description:
- Create `scripts/generators/memory.py` with `MemoryGenerator` class
- Implement `discover_sources()` to locate the memory file
- Implement `hash_source()` with SHA-256 of file contents
- Implement `build_prompt()` with memory-specific LLM prompt
- Implement `parse_response()` to extract structured catalog entry from LLM output
- Implement `merge_entry()` preserving `sections`, `bundle`, `co_retrieve_for` from existing entries
- Write unit tests including merge preservation and first-run behavior

blocks.name: Diary catalog generator
blocks.description:
- Create `scripts/generators/diary.py` with `DiaryGenerator` class
- Implement `discover_sources()` to enumerate day directories within the lookback window
- Implement `hash_source()` computing SHA-256 over sorted file contents of a day directory
- Implement `build_prompt()` with diary-specific LLM prompt for day summarization
- Implement `parse_response()` producing entries matching the diary catalog schema (date, sessions, topics, projects, word_count)
- Implement pruning of days that fall outside the lookback window
- Write unit tests for discovery, hashing across multiple files, lookback windowing, and schema compliance

blocks.name: Skills and resources catalog generators
blocks.description:
- Create `scripts/generators/skills.py` with `SkillsGenerator` class
- Create `scripts/generators/resources.py` with `ResourcesGenerator` class
- Implement `discover_sources()`, `build_prompt()`, and `parse_response()` for each
- Implement early-exit when the corresponding config flag is disabled
- Write unit tests for both generators including disabled-state behavior

blocks.name: Catalog dispatcher
blocks.description:
- Create `scripts/generators/dispatcher.py` with `generate_catalogs()` function
- Implement sequential generator execution with progress logging
- Implement generator filtering via `generators` parameter
- Implement error classification: critical (state file corruption) vs. non-critical (single entry LLM failure)
- Aggregate and return `list[GenerationResult]`
- Write unit tests for sequencing, filtering, error propagation, and dry-run aggregation

blocks.name: `context_manager.py` catalog-first read paths
blocks.description:
- Implement `_read_catalog_or_scan()` with try/catalog-first, catch/fallback-to-scan logic
- Add catalog read paths for memory, diary, skills, and resources
- Implement once-per-session warning logging for catalog failures
- Implement schema version checking — reject catalogs with unknown schema versions and fall back
- Write unit tests for catalog hit, catalog miss, corrupt JSON, and schema mismatch scenarios

blocks.name: `/dream` integration and `/refresh-catalogs` skill
blocks.description:
- Add `<!-- catalog-regen -->` section to `dream.md` skill file calling the dispatcher
- Create `refresh-catalogs.md` skill file with flag parsing and dispatcher invocation
- Implement `--dry-run` output formatting showing what would be generated/pruned
- Implement `--force` flag passthrough to dispatcher
- Implement `--generators` flag to selectively regenerate specific catalogs
- Write integration tests verifying `/dream` triggers catalog regeneration
- Write integration tests for `/refresh-catalogs` with each flag combination
